inputs.label: Transmitted Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Base frequency of emitted sound wave

inputs.label: Target Speed
inputs.businessContext: Speed of the reflecting target. Positive for approaching, negative for receding.

inputs.label: Angle (θ)
inputs.businessContext: Angle between target velocity vector and the line connecting source and target. 0° for head-on approach.

inputs.label: Speed of Sound
inputs.businessContext: Speed of sound in the medium (e.g., air at 20°C)

formulas.observedFrequency: transmittedFrequency * (speedOfSound + targetSpeed * Math.cos(angle * Math.PI / 180)) / (speedOfSound - targetSpeed * Math.cos(angle * Math.PI / 180))
